name: Lemon Poppyseed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Generously grease and flour pan.
3. Blend all ingredients in large bowl; beat at medium speed for 2-3 minutes, or until well blended.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 45 minutes or until toothpick inserted in cake comes out clean.
